subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received. Thou hadst written about the establishment of the Spiritual Assembly in Tabaristan, which brought exceeding joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید از تاسیس محفل روحانی در طبرستان مرقوم نموده بودید بسیار سبب سرور
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @Hands of the Cause, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @praise and encouragement
